cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out who ends up with which ball. The problem involves several swaps between players. I need to track each swap step by step. So Dave (white) and Eve (green) exchange. After this swap: - Dave has green - Eve has white Second swap: Bob and Claire swap. Bob (brown) and Claire (blue) exchange.
